summary: Iteration 33 - BVE Signal Fixes and Mute Button Testing Complete. All 4 reported bugs have been verified as FIXED: 1) BVE signal now appears on Dashboard page when in BVE mode (purple banner visible), 2) BVE signal now appears on Trade Monitor page when in BVE mode (Active Signal card shows signal), 3) Mute button now stops active alarm immediately via useEffect, 4) Projected exit value uses truncateTo2Decimals for consistency.
seed_data_creation: Created BVE test signals during testing (cleaned up after)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 reported bugs verified as fixed. BVE signal fetching uses useCallback with isInBVE dependency. Mute button uses useEffect to stop audio when soundEnabled becomes false. truncateTo2Decimals used consistently for LOT and exit value calculations.

bve_signal_on_dashboard.details: BVE banner 'Beta Virtual Environment Active' appears on Dashboard when in BVE mode. Active Signal card shows MOIL10 BUY signal.

bve_signal_on_trade_monitor.details: Active Signal card on Trade Monitor shows signal when in BVE mode. Signal displays product (MOIL10), direction (BUY), trade time (19:16), and profit multiplier (×15).

mute_button_stops_audio.details: Sound toggle button (data-testid='sound-toggle') changes from Volume2 to VolumeX when clicked. useEffect at lines 362-373 in TradeMonitorPage.jsx stops audio immediately when soundEnabled becomes false.

projected_exit_value_consistency.details: truncateTo2Decimals function used consistently in both TradeMonitorPage.jsx and ProfitTrackerPage.jsx for LOT size (accountValue/980) and exit value (lotSize*15) calculations.

bve_enter_exit.details: BVE Enter button (data-testid='bve-enter') visible in header. Clicking enters BVE mode. BVE Exit button (data-testid='bve-exit') exits BVE mode.

api_tests.GET /api/bve/active-signal: PASS - Returns active signal in BVE mode
api_tests.GET /api/bve/summary: PASS - Returns account data in BVE mode
api_tests.GET /api/profit/summary: PASS - Returns account value for LOT calculation

ui_tests.dashboard_bve_banner: PASS - Purple BVE banner visible when in BVE mode
ui_tests.trade_monitor_signal_card: PASS - Active Signal card shows signal in BVE mode
ui_tests.sound_toggle_button: PASS - Mute button toggles between Volume2 and VolumeX icons

TradeMonitorPage.jsx.loadData_useCallback: Line 247-266 - loadData wrapped in useCallback with isInBVE dependency
TradeMonitorPage.jsx.bve_signal_fetch: Line 250-251 - Uses api.get('/bve/active-signal') when isInBVE is true
TradeMonitorPage.jsx.mute_useEffect: Lines 362-373 - Stops audio when soundEnabled becomes false
TradeMonitorPage.jsx.truncateTo2Decimals: Lines 23-25, 180-181, 358 - Used for LOT and exit value calculations

DashboardPage.jsx.loadDashboardData_useCallback: Line 43-113 - loadDashboardData wrapped in useCallback with isInBVE dependency
DashboardPage.jsx.bve_signal_fetch: Line 46 - Uses api.get('/bve/active-signal') when isInBVE is true
DashboardPage.jsx.bve_banner: Lines 183-190 - Shows BVE banner when isInBVE is true

BVEContext.jsx.isInBVE_state: Line 18 - isInBVE state managed in context
BVEContext.jsx.session_restore: Lines 98-118 - Restores BVE session from localStorage on mount
